temporal_description:
(00:00-00:03) A woman with dark, wavy hair, wearing a hospital gown, lies in a hospital bed. Her face is contorted in anger as she glares off-screen and shouts, her mouth wide open as if yelling. (Storyline: The scene opens on a tense confrontation. The woman, who appears to be a patient, is angrily defending her husband from an unseen person.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Angry, loud, and aggressive. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
(00:04-00:06) The woman's expression remains furious as she continues to shout, her anger unabated. She holds her hand over her stomach, as if in pain or emphasizing her pregnancy. (Storyline: The woman's anger escalates as she repeats her threat, reinforcing the intensity of the confrontation.) (Audio: 1) Tone of speech: Furious and threatening. 2) Background sounds or music: None.)
